description: Outputs fold change, signal to noise and modified score (which deweights highly variable hps from reference control) for RNAI HP scoring
author: Barbara Weir, Broad Institute
plan:
## shRNAscores GenePattern Module — Implementation Plan

### 1. Overview
shRNAscores is a GenePattern module that Outputs fold change, signal to noise and modified score (which deweights highly variable hps from reference control) for RNAI HP scoring

### 2. Parameters
The module exposes 5 parameters:
- Required: gct, array.info, reference, annotation, output.prefix
- Optional: none

### 3. Command Line
```
<R2.5> <libdir>HPscores.R HPscores -i<gct> -s<array.info> -r<reference> -a<annotation> -e<output.prefix> -l<libdir>
```

### 4. Docker Image
Docker image: 

### 5. Validation Strategy
- Validate all required parameters are provided
- Validate file formats match expected extensions
- Check parameter value ranges where applicable

### 6. Implementation Roadmap
Phase 1: Wrapper script implementation
Phase 2: Docker container setup
Phase 3: Parameter validation and error handling
Phase 4: Testing and documentation

parameters.name: reference
parameters.description: Reference to compare each cell line to - name can partially or totally match 'Array_timepoint' column of array.info file
